title: datapacktools
body:
# What is this mod?

This mod adds useful tweaks for datapack creators. You can read more about all the included features below.

---

# Tweaks

## In-game Datapack Editor

A fully functional in-game datapack function editor! Available since version 1.1.0.
Supports creating functions, editing, comments, suggestions, and even folders!

<details>
<summary>In-game editor showcase</summary>

![in-game editor showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fbb7ab14c6f1b255440b7c2cc5d489704f284da_0.webp)

![suggestions showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be33c52af3fe4ab9dc2622c64266120e5d091cc_0.webp)

![modal showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a94390dbf1fb257e6376c0aa93cfc05ee5a839dc_0.webp)

</details>

## Converting Command Block Chains into Functions

A new button has been added to the command block interface, allowing you to export a command block chain as a datapack function.
Alternatively, you can press `F10` while in the command block interface, or hover over a command block and press `F10` to open the conversion screen.

<details>
<summary>Button showcase</summary>

![button showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f334db06ed4ee49da77cabb33e1861e80f986449.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Export screen showcase</summary>

![export screen showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88308bc7f7c2aaf14335c0db4d16884e34857e30.png)

</details>

The mod also provides an option to remove the entire command block chain and replace the first command block with a call to the newly created function.

**Important:**
The start of the chain is defined by the command block from which the export is initiated. This allows you to convert only a selected portion of a command block chain into a function.
To export the entire chain, you must open the export screen from the command block at the very beginning of the chain.

---

# Additional

To select the datapack you want to edit, press `F8` (or any key you have bound to this action).

<details>
<summary>Selecting datapack showcase</summary>

![selecting datapack showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4061788d7aa7db7e26158df12f360e4d8c9289e6.png)

![selecting namespace showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31c4801f161a21e8a1f3d5dc1b15b320d34d06c.png)

</details>

---

# Thanks to..
- Dundunkin for the idea behind this mod and all the tweaks.
- [Twemoji](https://github.com/twitter/twemoji) for the icons used in the project logo.
